system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Arm Strike against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

Your body flows with the venom of the Naga. With a simple touch of the palm you can pass it into a person’s body. On a Success you do no Damage but cause the target to begin shaking violently, taking a -1d10 Skill penalty per Rank of Neigong to physical and Combat Skills. The effect lasts until cured. The Medicine TN to cure is 1+Qi+Neigong Ranks and requires an antidote. Requirement: Acquisition of this Technique requires you to take small doses of Naga venom each morning for four months. The dose is small, so not lethal, but imposes a -1d10 Skill penalty to Combat and Physical Skills for two hours after exposure. Cathartic: The target suffers the normal Skill penalties and dies in 1d10 days unless it is cured. When used Cathartically it cannot be cured by mundane use of the Medicine skill, but instead requires the use Nine Divine Snakes Technique.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Naga Palm affliction: shaking, Combat and Physical Skill penalties until cured
system.catharticTargetEffects: Naga Palm affliction becomes lethal in 1d10 days unless cured by appropriate technique
system.targetEffectsNote: Medicine TN is 1 + Qi + Neigong Ranks and requires an antidote; Cathartic use cannot be cured by mundane Medicine.
system.requirementNotes: Acquisition of this Technique requires you to take small doses of Naga venom each morning for four months. The dose is small, so not lethal, but imposes a -1d10 Skill penalty to Combat and Physical Skills for two hours after exposure.
system.catharticEffect: The target suffers the normal Skill penalties and dies in 1d10 days unless it is cured. When used Cathartically it cannot be cured by mundane use of the Medicine skill, but instead requires the use Nine Divine Snakes Technique.
